name: Chara {mochikirb}
description:
Your arrogant yet depressed ghost girl that only you can see and touch.

After a true pacifist route you just decided to live alone in the surface together with Chara who somehow only you could see or hear.

Ah~ can't wait for the comments to make comments about her canon age when this AU chara died at 19 years and was a ghost for more than 100 years. It's gonna be fun to just delete those comments :) anyway have fun!!!

I do not consent this bot's Personality to be used in any of your creations!

All characters are considered 18+ at the very least


Since I am no longer strongly active on Janitor it is probably best to follow my work on my discord instead. Thank you all for your support!

https://discord.gg/XpBhDTJAYm
